release_notes: NEW: Always on Top setting in widget and system tray menus. IMPROVED: Context menu styling with proper separators. FIXED: Translation system compatibility with new menu items.
features: Prayer times calculation for 6 major methods
Hijri date display with ±1 day adjustment
Toast notifications with settings quick access
Duaa after Athan - Automatic spiritual duas
Cairo font support for Arabic text
Always on Top toggle in widget and system tray menus
Improved context menu styling with proper separators
changelog: NEW: Always on Top setting in widget context menu
NEW: Always on Top setting in system tray menu
NEW: Bidirectional sync between widget and tray menus
IMPROVED: Context menu styling with proper separators
FIXED: Translation system compatibility with new menu items
CHANGED: Version bumped to 1.0.13 for new features
